title: My Ghost Animal
description: Tamed mobs become a spirit. (Currently it only works on a dog and cat!)
body:
![My Ghost Animal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3a5ddb620ad4b2052502c76605ad485d61825f3.png)
#
## ![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bc1d2b2e673889c0369fccab675b375f18e9c4a.png)
## **Under preparation:**

- Multiple version support
- Version testing
- Horse
- Parrot
- Revive
- Particles
- Animations
- Etc...
## 
# More information:
- It has advancement
- If you have an idea for the mod that isn't included, leave a comment.
- [Curseforge website](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/my-ghost-animal)
## Spawning a ghost dog
